creator: eric@madrid.lol
text:
Support for Informix 14.10!

PHP 7.x driver AKA PDO_INFORMIX 1.3.3
Python 3.x driver AKA IfxPy 3.0.3

Example using Slackware: https://www.team3.org/index.php?ps=a

I have seem others looking for the php driver, from a google search.
I see a Python 2.x driver.

The Informix CSDK packages may present a problem?

I'm sure this would be at the bottom of your list, but it would be nice to see it working!

Thanks for making BSD great,
Eric
